text.title: Design Patterns Overview Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the patterns-overview methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: document-symptom
step.input: Problem area + evidence (logs / latency / code smell).
step.action: Write the symptom in one paragraph with measurable signals.

step.name: shortlist-from-catalog
step.action: Pick 2-4 candidate patterns whose intent matches the symptom.

step.name: score-cost-and-fit
step.action: Score each candidate on fit (1-5) and indirection cost (1-5).

step.name: select-and-justify
step.action: Pick the highest fit / cost ratio; name two rejected alternatives.

step.name: emit-adr
step.action: Compose ADR with chosen pattern + rejected + cost + review trigger.
